mapper.insert: INSERT INTO file_metadata (id, file_id, file_name, original_file_name, file_path, file_type, file_size, md5, storage_type, bucket_name, object_key, status, create_by, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{fileId}, #{fileName}, #{originalFileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileType}, #{fileSize}, #{md5}, #{storageType}, #{bucketName}, #{objectKey}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM file_metadata WHERE file_type IS NULL OR (file_type NOT LIKE '%pdf%' AND file_type NOT LIKE '%word%' AND file_type NOT LIKE '%msword%' AND file_type NOT LIKE '%csv%' AND file_type NOT LIKE '%spreadsheet%' AND file_type NOT LIKE '%excel%' AND file_type NOT LIKE '%powerpoint%' AND file_type NOT LIKE '%presentation%')
AND create_by = #{createBy}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM file_metadata WHERE (file_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR original_file_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) AND (file_type IS NULL OR (file_type NOT LIKE '%pdf%' AND file_type NOT LIKE '%word%' AND file_type NOT LIKE '%msword%' AND file_type NOT LIKE '%csv%' AND file_type NOT LIKE '%spreadsheet%' AND file_type NOT LIKE '%excel%' AND file_type NOT LIKE '%powerpoint%' AND file_type NOT LIKE '%presentation%'))
AND create_by = #{createBy}
